name: Phishing
data_sources: Email gateway logs, mailbox audit logs, URL click telemetry
detection_notes: Correlate suspicious messages, lookalike domains, attachment execution, and post-click identity events.

name: User Execution
data_sources: Process creation, command-line telemetry, email attachment handling
detection_notes: Track user-driven launches of scripts, installers, HTA, Office child processes, and suspicious container files.

name: PowerShell
data_sources: Process creation, PowerShell operational logs, script block logging
detection_notes: Monitor encoded or obfuscated command lines, suspicious parent-child chains, and download cradle behavior.

name: Web Protocols
data_sources: Proxy logs, firewall logs, DNS telemetry, URL reputation
detection_notes: Prioritize newly observed domains, rare destinations, and endpoint-to-network process lineage.

name: Valid Accounts
data_sources: Authentication logs, MFA events, VPN logs, privileged activity records
detection_notes: Score unusual logons, privileged use on critical assets, impossible travel, and identity-provider anomalies.

name: Email Collection: Email Forwarding Rule
data_sources: Mailbox audit logs, admin audit logs, message trace
detection_notes: Alert on newly created forwarding rules, hidden inbox rules, and post-compromise mail manipulation.

name: OS Credential Dumping
data_sources: Process creation, memory access telemetry, security logs
detection_notes: Detect LSASS access, suspicious dump tooling, and post-authentication credential harvesting patterns.

name: Remote Services
data_sources: Network connection logs, remote admin logs, authentication records
detection_notes: Correlate privileged remote access, service creation, SMB/RDP bursts, and unusual east-west movement.

name: Scheduled Task/Job
data_sources: Task scheduler logs, cron logs, process creation telemetry
detection_notes: Detect newly created tasks tied to suspicious binaries, scripts, or encoded command lines.

name: Service Stop
data_sources: Service control events, process creation, admin command telemetry
detection_notes: Ransomware operators often stop security, database, and backup services before encryption.

name: Inhibit System Recovery
data_sources: Backup logs, system utility execution, hypervisor activity
detection_notes: Monitor shadow copy deletion, backup tampering, and recovery-control changes.

name: Data Encrypted for Impact
data_sources: File activity telemetry, process behavior, ransom note creation
detection_notes: Combine high-volume file modification, extension changes, and pre-encryption preparation signals.
